name: Bran Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 cup all-purpose flour or bread flour
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400°F.
In a large mixing bowl, combine all ingredients. Using a mixer, blend on medium speed for 5-7 minutes until smooth.
Pour the batter into paper-lined muffin cups.
Bake for 20 minutes.
